text.title: nextjs-app-router Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for nextjs-app-router as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: useEffect(() => fetch('/api/x')) inside a client component when data could be fetched in the server component parent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Adds a network round-trip, slows first paint, and bypasses RSC's direct DB access capability.

failure-mode.description: 'use client' at the top of every component file.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-RSC habit that converts all components to client-side JS; eliminates server rendering benefits entirely.

failure-mode.description: Importing Node-only modules (crypto, fs, path) in middleware.ts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Middleware runs on the Edge runtime which does not support Node built-ins; the build fails silently or at runtime.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Over-invalidation purges the entire cache; performance collapses on high-traffic sites. Invalidate only the affected path or tag.
